pullRequest.title: DOM-54805 - [UI] Add new Projects Billing tag search and bulk update table

nodes.body:
Something to consider here, as you are awaiting fetch projects, you could see the tag deleted toast and then tag was not deleted one if this fails. 
In practice this scenario is imposible as we know the implementation of fetch projects can not throw an error, but I think that a component should not rely on knowing the implementation of a prop.
we should not use any, you can use the data type of the table data source or unknown
you have a state setter here but the state is never read. I think it should not be necessary
I think we should assign the default value to `[]` for safety as at least by type definition this can be undefined

Not sure if this is correct by design of the feature, but you are setting the submitting flag to false before the refetch ends, this could technically allow operating over a set of outdated data. In any case the submitting bulk state is not used so I think this does not change anything.
